modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Question about the layout tool in Google Blogger

full_description_text:  
I am trying to understand what the layout tool is in Google Blogger. I want to know how it works and what I can do with it. I am not very familiar with Blogger, so I need some help explaining this feature.
short_description: Question about the layout tool in Google Blogger
description: I am trying to understand what the layout tool is in Google Blogger. I want to know how it works and what I can do with it. I am not very familiar with Blogger, so I need some help explaining this feature.
